name: The King's Secret
description: Infiltrate the royal estate, now overrun by dark forces. Rumor has it the King left a secret note revealing the location of the Artifact. Find it in the Secret Room and escape.
victoryMessage: You have secured the King's Secret Note! The resistance will be pleased.

rooms.name: Entrance
rooms.flavorText: The heavy iron gates of the estate loom behind you. The path ahead leads into the main keep.

rooms.name: Grand Hall
rooms.flavorText: Once a place of celebration, now silent. Long shadows stretch across the cold stone floor.

npcs.name: Old Knight Galahad
dialogue: You have the eyes of a warrior, but your blade is dull.
Let me show you a technique from the old wars.

rooms.name: Corridor Entrance
rooms.flavorText: A central junction connecting the towers to the main living quarters.

rooms.name: Watch Tower 1
rooms.flavorText: The first of the defensive towers. Arrows slit windows look out over the grounds.

npcs.name: Royal Scout Elara
dialogue: The patrols are changing shifts soon. You have a narrow window.
Take this extra torch. It should buy you some time.

rooms.name: Watch Tower 2
rooms.flavorText: A musty tower room.

treasures.name: Vantage Point
treasures.message: The view from this tower is amazing. You can see clear across the peaks of the mountains.

rooms.name: Watch Tower 3
rooms.flavorText: The westernmost tower. The wind howls through the arrow slits.

rooms.name: Archer's Closet
rooms.flavorText: Stacks of arrows and broken bows litter the floor.

rooms.name: Guard Post
rooms.flavorText: A small station for the guards. A half-eaten meal sits on the table.

rooms.name: Jail Cell
rooms.flavorText: Iron bars and dank straw. Fortunately, it's empty.

rooms.name: Corridor 1
rooms.flavorText: A long hallway lined with tapestries.

rooms.name: Weapons Room
rooms.flavorText: Racks of rusted swords and shields.

rooms.name: Corridor 2
rooms.flavorText: The hallway continues deeper into the estate.

rooms.name: Maid's Chambers
rooms.flavorText: Simple quarters, now overturned and ransacked.

rooms.name: Corridor 3
rooms.flavorText: The smell of food wafts from the west.

rooms.name: Dining Hall
rooms.flavorText: A long table set for a feast that never happened.

rooms.name: Kitchen
rooms.flavorText: Pots and pans hang from the ceiling.

rooms.name: Wine Cellar
rooms.flavorText: Barrels of aged wine stack against the walls.

rooms.name: Pantry
rooms.flavorText: Sacks of grain and dried meats.

rooms.name: Knight's Memorial
rooms.flavorText: A quiet garden dedicated to fallen heroes.

rooms.name: Pigs Pen
rooms.flavorText: Mud and muck. It smells terrible.

rooms.name: Chicken Coop
rooms.flavorText: Feathers everywhere.

rooms.name: Grazing Fields
rooms.flavorText: Open fields where cattle used to roam.

rooms.name: Ground Keeper's Den
rooms.flavorText: A small shack filled with gardening tools.

rooms.name: Tool Shed
rooms.flavorText: Rusty saws and hammers.

npcs.name: Fuel
dialogue: You dig through the shed and find some fuel for your torch.

rooms.name: King's Chamber
rooms.flavorText: The royal bedroom. Rich velvet drapes hang in tatters.

rooms.name: King's Wash Room
rooms.flavorText: A large copper tub sits in the center.

rooms.name: King's Wardrobe
rooms.flavorText: Rows of fine clothes. There's a suspicious draft coming from the south wall.

rooms.name: Secret Room
rooms.flavorText: A hidden chamber deep within the castle. A desk sits in the corner.

rooms.name: Courtyard Entrance
rooms.flavorText: Fresh air blows in from the gardens.

rooms.name: Guest Chambers
rooms.flavorText: Lavish rooms for visiting dignitaries.

rooms.name: Fountain
rooms.flavorText: A beautiful stone fountain, now dry.

rooms.name: Rose Garden
rooms.flavorText: Thorny bushes overgrown with wild roses.

rooms.name: Cabbage Patch
rooms.flavorText: Rows of rotting cabbages.
